description: Candidate public asset sources for the first Mac Game Rigger production-trial pack. These are source candidates only; do not treat a slot as realAsset until the binary is downloaded, inspected, and registered in samples/manifest.json.

licenseBasis.summary: Quaternius states that models are under CC0, usable without attribution in commercial, educational, and personal projects.
Kenney states that game assets on its asset pages are public domain licensed (CC0) and usable in commercial projects.

candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick a normal-proportion human character with a neutral pose and minimal accessories.
Pick a short-limb or large-head stylized character if present; otherwise mark this slot as needing a second public source.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Modular Character Outfits - Fantasy or RPG Character Pack
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick knight/armor variant to stress rigid armor binding and weight bleed.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Animated Man Pack or Animated Woman Pack
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Use the simplest low-poly human mesh available and record vertex count after import.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Modular Men Pack or Ultimate Animated Character Pack
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick a bulky/soldier/armored male character to stress shoulder deformation.
Pick the thinnest human/elf-like character available; if none exists, mark source gap before registering the slot.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Ultimate Animated Animal Pack or Farm Animal Pack
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick husky/shiba/dog model and verify it imports as a four-leg character rather than a decorative static mesh.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Cube World Kit or Ultimate Animated Animal Pack
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick cat or small mammal model with visible tail base.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Animated Dinosaur Pack or Ultimate Monsters
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick dinosaur/dragon-like model with a long tail. If wings are absent, record this as tail-only evidence and keep wing helper out of scope.

candidateSlots.candidateSourceName: Quaternius Steampunk Turret Pack or Fantasy Props MegaKit
candidateSlots.selectionNotes: Pick a turret or hinged prop with clear rotating parts for prop-rig validation.

registrationRule: A candidate becomes a realAsset only after the binary is downloaded, license/source is recorded, and local asset path or storage reference is known.
nextAction: Download one H-001 candidate first, inspect it in Blender, then register only H-001 in samples/manifest.json with scripts/register_asset_evidence.py after QA/preview/export evidence exists.
